text: When was the last time your strong accent saved you? Andrea got an urgent WhatsApp message from 'me' - it was a real-time deepfake video call. My Estonian accent was missing - that's what gave it away.
KYB is broken. We're going to rebuild it. Veriff acquired global KYB company Vespia to join us on this mission.
The 'Gartner Tax' is dead. Ignore pay-to-plays and keep investing every dollar in R&D as the best product always wins!

Every Christmas season it's time to help your parents out. My father's iPhone Face ID was all that was needed to open his iPhone with my face. Clear example: Face ID is just a UX feature, not real identity verification.
At Veriff: tripled volumes, doubled revenue, $100M+ revenue & growing profitably. Now, every fourth person uses Veriff across multiple merchants each quarter.
